caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Impact Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 23 knots with wave heights reaching 5.4 feet and a swell period of 7 seconds. Rain chances remain below 50 percent, minimizing heavy precipitation concerns, while San Juan reports lighter winds near 14 knots with calmer seas.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Eastern Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing moderate westerly winds sustained at 19 knots with significant wave heights reaching 10.8 feet and a swell period of 8 seconds from the WNW. Mykonos reports slightly stronger winds up to 24 knots, but overall conditions remain below Small Craft Advisory thresholds with a maximum 33 percent chance of rain in the region.
